/.src/globalFetch_preview.ts(5,24): warning TS377061: This code uses the global `fetch` function, HTTP requests are represented through `HttpClient` from `@effect/platform`. effect(globalFetch)


==== /.src/globalFetch_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics globalFetch:warning
    
    export const preview = fetch("https://example.com")
                           ~~!!! warning TS377061: This code uses the global `fetch` function, HTTP requests are represented through `HttpClient` from `@effect/platform`. effect(globalFetch)
